title: Grilled Flaky Kenyan Flour Crumble
description: A fresh, flaky festive dish featuring five spice powder and grilled to perfection for a halal-friendly meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine Kenyan flour, five spice powder, and salt. Mix well.
Gradually add vegetable oil while continuously stirring to create a smooth dough.
Form the dough into small balls or patties, ensuring they are not too big as they will spread during grilling.
Preheat your grill to medium-high heat (around 400°F).
Place each flaky crumble on a preheated grill for about 3-5 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Flip the crumbles once to ensure even cooking. Remove from grill and serve immediately.
